articles.title: Patch for Windows Defender 0-day could allow attackers to fill hard disk
articles.content: The feud between NightmareEclipse and Microsoft shows no signs of resolving soon.
articles.titleZh: Windows Defender 0-day修补程序可能允许攻击者填充硬盘
articles.contentZh: NightmareEclipse和微软之间的争执没有很快解决的迹象。

articles.title: Allstate accuses Broadcom of auditing it because it quit VMware, CA
articles.content: Broadcom accuses Allstate of dodging VMware audits.
articles.titleZh: Allstate指责Broadcom对其进行审计，因为它退出了加利福尼亚州的VMware

articles.title: Google pays $250K for Linux vulnerability allowing guest VM escapes
articles.content: Both vulnerabilities allow untrusted users to gain root privileges.
articles.titleZh: 谷歌为Linux漏洞支付$ 250K ，允许访客虚拟机逃逸
articles.contentZh: 这两个漏洞都允许不受信任的用户获得root权限。

articles.title: Aussie gov't tells volunteers to throw out thousands of functioning test routers
articles.content: But the devices could "easily be reflashed."
articles.titleZh: 澳大利亚政府要求志愿者扔掉数千台功能正常的测试路由器
articles.contentZh: 但这些设备可以“轻松刷新”。

articles.title: Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
articles.content: Microsoft may once again be struggling to keep up with its own climate goals, according to its 2026 sustainability report. As reported by GeekWire, the report states that Microsoft's carbon emissions increased 25 percent in 2025, totalling 34 million metric tons "without select interventions." Microsoft says this was "driven primarily by the expansion of our […]
articles.titleZh: 微软的碳排放量去年增长了25%
articles.contentZh: 根据其2026年可持续发展报告，微软可能再次难以跟上自己的气候目标。正如GeekWire报道的那样，该报告指出，微软的碳排放量在2025年增加了25% ，总计3400万公吨“没有选择性的干预措施”。“微软表示，这主要是由于我们[…]的扩张

articles.title: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
articles.content: OpenAI's Fidji Simo is departing her full-time role as the company's AGI chief and is transitioning to being a "part-time advisor," she said on X. The news follows Simo's original announcement in April that she would take a few weeks of medical leave due to a neuroimmune condition, shortly after she had taken on the […]
articles.titleZh: Fidji Simo因病辞去OpenAI的AGI领导职务
articles.contentZh: OpenAI的菲吉·西莫（ Fidji Simo ）在X上说，她将辞去公司AGI首席执行官的全职职务，并转为“兼职顾问”。这一消息是在西莫4月份最初宣布，由于神经免疫疾病，她将在就职后不久休几周的病假[…]
